name: Anivar A. Aravind
title: Anivar A. Aravind — engineering executive and systems thinker
positioning: Anivar A. Aravind — engineering leadership and systems thinking for technology that has to ship commercially, hold up under regulator and board scrutiny, and reach population scale at once.
operatorLine: Twenty-year engineering leader. Global commerce, RBI-regulated FinTech, multilingual public computing. Platforms used by hundreds of millions.
editorialLine: Systems thinker on AI governance, corrigibility, and the human layer of software. Writes Layer 8.
